memberdef.name: Resampler_getset
ResamplerObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "resample.Resampler", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(ResamplerObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)ResamplerObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create a Resampler with the built-in 4096×19 Kaiser bank.\n", .tp_methods = ResamplerObj_methods, .tp_getset = Resampler_getset, .tp_new = ResamplerObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)ResamplerObj_init, }
